zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Clifton於1404年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Sir Gervase Clifton-8歲，母親Isabel Herbert Finch-1歲。他於大約1433年與Alice Booth在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年4月9日在他的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert De Clifton于1404年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓时，他的父亲Sir Gervase Clifton-8岁，母亲Isabel Herbert Finch-1岁。他于大约1433年与Alice Booth在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年4月9日在他的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Clifton was born in 1404, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Gervase Clifton, was -8 and his mother, Isabel Herbert Finch, was -1. He married Alice Booth about 1433, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 April 1478, in his hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Clifton est né en 1404, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Gervase Clifton, avait -8 ans et sa mère, Isabel Herbert Finch, avait -1 ans. Il a épousé Alice Booth environ 1433, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert De Clifton 1404 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gervase Clifton -8 und seine Mutter Isabel Herbert Finch -1. Er hat um 1433 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England Alice Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. April 1478 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Clifton è nato il nel 1404 nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Gervase Clifton, aveva -8 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Herbert Finch, aveva -1 anni. Lui sposato Alice Booth circa 1433, nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 aprile 1478, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Cliftonが1404年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Gervase Cliftonは-8歳，母Isabel Herbert Finchは-1歳であった。約1433年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンでAlice Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年4月9日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Clifton(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gervase Clifton(은)는 -8세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Herbert Finch(은)는 -1세였다. 그는 대략 1433년 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 Alice Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 4월 9일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Clifton nasceu em 1404, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Gervase Clifton, tinha -8 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Herbert Finch, tinha -1 anos. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Clifton родился в 1404 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Gervase Clifton было -8 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Herbert Finch, -1. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Booth около 1433 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 апреля 1478 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
